name: Witching hour liminal time-ob3ect: the threshold moment (3 AM, Samhain, solstices) when the veil between worlds thins. FSPLIT: the liminal moment splits time into the ordinary flow and the timeless interval where past/present/future coexist. FFUSE: the moment passes, reconstituting ordinary time — but with something carried across the threshold. VINIT: time before the thinning. TANCH: the clock striking the hour. AFWD: the veil opens. AREV: the veil closes. ENGAGR: the moment is simultaneously within time (it has a clock position) and outside time (it touches eternity).

phase_0.domain_name: Witching hour liminal time-ob3ect: the threshold moment (3 AM, Samhain, solstices) when the veil between worlds thins. FSPLIT: the liminal moment splits time into the ordinary flow and the timeless interval where past/present/future coexist. FFUSE: the moment passes, reconstituting ordinary time — but with something carried across the threshold. VINIT: time before the thinning. TANCH: the clock striking the hour. AFWD: the veil opens. AREV: the veil closes. ENGAGR: the moment is simultaneously within time (it has a clock position) and outside time (it touches eternity).

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any liminal event occurs

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains and marks the threshold moment

AFWD.justification: forward morphism toward the timeless interval

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequence of opening, threshold experience, and closing
CLINK.justification: composition of morphisms forming the complete liminal event

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the threshold moment itself recognizing its own nature
IMSCRIB.justification: self-reference: the moment knows it is both in and out of time

FSPLIT.justification: splits ordinary flow into two branches: ordinary time and the timeless interval

FFUSE.chosen_element: the moment passes, reconstituting ordinary time
FFUSE.justification: fuses the two branches back into a single timeline, carrying something across

EVALT.chosen_element: the threshold is successfully crossed and something is carried back
EVALT.justification: affirmative outcome: the liminal passage yields transformation

EVALF.chosen_element: the threshold is crossed but nothing is gained or lost
EVALF.justification: negative outcome: the passage is empty, no transformation

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the moment is simultaneously within time and outside time
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: the clock position is real, yet the moment touches eternity

IFIX.chosen_element: the memory of what crossed the threshold
IFIX.justification: permanent record of the transformation carried across the veil

phase_2.fuse_element: the moment passes, reconstituting ordinary time
phase_2.fuse_result: ordinary time flow (with something carried across)

phase_3.void_description: time before any liminal thinning, unmarked
phase_3.both_description: the moment is both within and outside time

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the threshold moment recognizes itself as a liminal event
Step 2 AREV: descent from ordinary time into the timeless interval
Step 3 FSPLIT: the moment splits time into ordinary flow and timeless coexistence
Step 4 AFWD: ascent through the veil into the timeless interval
Step 5 FFUSE: the two branches fuse back into ordinary time, carrying something across
Step 6 CLINK: compose the opening, threshold experience, and closing into a single event
Step 7 IFIX: record permanently what crossed the threshold
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the moment closes, recognizing itself as complete

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the ritual or intention that invokes the liminal moment
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: symbolic resonance between the ordinary and timeless realms
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the collective unconscious or ancestral memory storing threshold crossings
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: astrological and seasonal cycles (3 AM, Samhain, solstices)
phase_5.alfs_store: the Book of Thoth or the Akashic Records as canonical reference

phase_6.cycle_cost: a moment of focused attention or ritual energy
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: ordinary time flow, no liminal opening
phase_6.post_cycle_state: ordinary time flow with a carried element
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle conserves the total time flow; the carried element is a transformation, not a loss
